title: Totaie's Create Horizons
description: Totaie's Create Horizon transforms Minecraft with new biomes, dungeons, and terrain, optimized for shader support. It enhances gameplay with QoL features, expands the Create mod, and offers over 200 mods for an immersive adventure and building experience.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mKOdsNWL/images/b82e91d26ad00d8a7f48a7a566b128c6236da473.png)

✅**Discover a Completely Transformed World:**
Explore diverse and breathtaking biomes with Oh The Biomes We've Gone, uncover hidden treasures in Dungeons and Taverns, and experience the dynamic terrain of Tectonic for a fresh, immersive world.

✅**Performance Optimized with Shader Support:**
Enjoy smooth gameplay with shader support specifically tailored for graphics cards, ensuring high-quality visuals and performance.

✅**Enhanced Quality of Life Features:**
Packed with numerous QoL improvements to streamline your adventure, making building, crafting, and exploration more intuitive and enjoyable.

✅**Expanded Create Experience with Addons:**
Dive deeper into the Create mod with custom addons and new mechanics, offering endless opportunities for complex engineering and automation.

✅**Massive Mod Collection:**
Over 200 carefully selected mods to enhance every aspect of your gameplay, from exploration and combat to building and technology.
